lines.en_lit: retroactively that the bill of divorce of this is not a bill of divorce, he performed the service with two houses, Rather, where said to This is your bill of divorce on condition that your counterpart dies. perhaps her counterpart die and the bill of divorce of this is bill of divorce, and remain without a house

Rather, he divorces both of them To one, he says: This is your bill of divorce on condition that your counterpart will not die. And to one, he says: This is your bill of divorce on condition that you will not enter the synagogue And perhaps her counterpart not die, and she will not enter the synagogue, the bill of divorce of both is a bill of divorce and he remains without a wife.

Rather, to one says: This is your bill of divorce on condition that your counterpart does not die. And to one he says: This is your bill of divorce on condition that I will enter the synagogue. If this dies, that one is alive; and if that dies, this is alive. What is there to say Perhaps her counterpart will die in the middle of the service, he performed the service with two houses, If he sees that she seeks, to die, he preemptively enter the synagogue, rendering the bill of divorce of a bill of divorce retroactively.

Rav Asi, and some say Rav Avira, strongly objects to However, if so, two widows of a brother who died without a child [yevamot] who come from one house, not be to levirate marriage. his yevama his yevama include
Ravina, and some say Rav Sherevya, strongly objects to this: However, if so, a betrothed not be to levirate marriage, outside to include the betrothed woman.
The Sages taught: A High Priest sacrifices acute mourner, does not eat Rabbi Yehuda says: The entire day. What The entire day? is necessary only to bring him from his house.

Abaye said to him: Now, to Rabbi Yehuda, we remove as it was taught was standing and sacrificing on top of the altar and heard that of his died, he leaves his service and exits the statement of Rabbi Yehuda. Rabbi Yosei says: He completes and you say we bring from his house
Rather, Rava said: What The entire day?
